name: limitless-stack
description: The operating protocol for the Limitless Stack — seven integrated tools (Claude, CLAUDE.md, Obsidian, NotebookLM, Pinecone, Antigravity, Paperclip) that form one AI-powered system for building and maintaining 100 vertical SaaS applications. Teaches agents the four-tool lookup order, the self-healing pipeline, cross-app pattern detection, and wiki maintenance.
